caption: The video appears to be an educational tutorial on cryogenic engineering, specifically focusing on Tutorial 4. The presentation is given by Prof. M D Atrey from the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIT Bombay. The slide shown discusses the work per unit mass of gas liquefied, with a formula presented as \( \frac{W_c}{m} = 486.2 \). As the video progresses, another value, \( y = 0.0215 \), is introduced, likely representing a parameter or variable relevant to the calculation or process being explained. The content suggests a detailed explanation of the principles and calculations involved in cryogenic processes, aimed at students or professionals in the field of mechanical engineering. The NPTEL logo indicates that this is part of a series of lectures available through the National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning platform.
